title: tassadia ovalifolia
intro: Tassadia ovalifolia is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa, and is also known as 'oval-leaf tassadia'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Tassadia ovalifolia has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or ointment, and has also been studied for its potential use in wound healing and as an antimicrobial agent.
